description.en: Closes the connection to this HID device and resets access permission, and returns aPromisewhich resolves once the permission was reset.

excerpt.es: Closes the connection to this HID device and resets access permission, and returns aPromisewhich resolves once the permission was reset.
excerpt.en: Closes the connection to this HID device and resets access permission, and returns aPromisewhich resolves once the permission was reset.
